name: scribble
description: Research, source synthesis, tool evaluation, and HTML artifact workflows for agent sessions.

interface.longDescription: Use Scribble for sourced research, tool evaluation, source synthesis, and single-file HTML artifacts when plain chat or Markdown is too flat.
defaultPrompt: Use Scribble to research this repo and make an HTML discovery report.
Use HTML Effectiveness to turn this plan into a single-file artifact.
Evaluate these tools for my stack.
Synthesize these sources into a concise decision memo.
